desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 face-up monster you control. If you Summon this way, during your next Standby Phase: Return the banished monster to the field.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 face-up monster you control. If you Summon this way, during your next Standby Phase: Return the banished monster to the field.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 1 face-up monster you control. If you Summon this way, during your next Standby Phase: Return the banished monster to the field.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Surge of Divine Light

action: Returns banished cards to the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
